title: ceratozamia muricata
intro: Ceratozamia muricata, also known as the Spiny Palmate Cycad, is a species of plant in the family Zamiaceae. This ancient, slow-growing plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceratozamia muricata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
